case_title: DASHIELL ATKINS VS. PORVIDENCE FOUNDATION OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT PORVIDENCE FOUNDATION OF SAN FRANCISCO DBA   350 JONES STORAGE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATKINS, DASHIELL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PORVIDENCE FOUNDATION OF SAN FRANCISCO DBA   350 JONES STORAGE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $0 BUT SHALL PROVIDE THE GIFT CARD PREVIOUSLY OFFERED. MR. ATKINS WAIVED HIS CLAIMS AGAINST PROVIDENCE IN MARCH 2018 WHEN HE STORED HIS BAG AND AGAIN IN SEPTEMBER 2018. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ATKINS, DASHIELL AS TO DEFENDANT PORVIDENCE FOUNDATION OF SAN FRANCISCO DBA   350 JONES STORAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED NOV-08-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PORVIDENCE FOUNDATION OF SAN FRANCISCO DBA   350 JONES STORAGE

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATKINS, DASHIELL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT PORVIDENCE FOUNDATION OF SAN FRANCISCO DBA   350 JONES STORAGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-27-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-27-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF DASHIELL ATKINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PROVIDENCE FOUNDATION OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HELEN R. LAMAR EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT PROVIDENCE FOUNDATION OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SHUCRITA JONES, SHELTER SUPERVISOR. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
